word: H5853 - עַטְרֹות אַדָּר - ʻAṭrôwth ʼAddâr - at-roth' ad-dawr' - Ataroth-adar

sections.paragraph:
Original: עטרות אדּר

Transliteration: ‛aṭrôth 'addâr

Phonetic: at-roth' ad-dawr'

BDB Definition:

Ataroth-adar or Ataroth-addar = "crowns of glory"
  1. a Gadite town on the west border of Benjamin

Origin: from the same as H5852 and H146

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
